tagline: Localize gị repo na ọ bụla commit.

hero.title: Hello n'asụsụ ọ bụla.
hero.lede: A na-asụgharị ibe a site na Resource Translator n'onwe ya, na nkwalite ọ bụla na isi, n'asụsụ ọ bụla Azure AI Translator na-akwado.

phrases.machine_translated: A na-asụgharị ya site n'aka onye ntụgharị Azure AI.
phrases.open_pull_request: Mepee arịrịọ na-adọta na nsụgharị ọhụrụ.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Nkowasi: Jikwaa gị software n'ebe ọ bụla n'ụwa.
phrases.thank_you: Ana m ekele gị nke ukwuu maka ịnwale onye nsụgharị na-arụ ọrụ.

features.reliable: Gbaa mbọ hụ na ị na-eme ka ọ bụrụ
features.configurable: Ụda, ụlọ ọrụ, glossary, okwu rụrụ arụ — ihe niile nwere ike ịhazi.
features.ci_native: Ezubere maka GitHub Actions na Pull-Request workflows.

footer.powered_by: Kwadoro site na Resource Translator na Azure AI Translator.
